commands.cmd: read-only privacy, goal-quality, timezone, normalization, API and communication audit

summary: Rejected calculation readiness: privacy, normalization shape and non-clinical communication pass, but active insights use global rather than nutrient-specific completeness and comparison/page day buckets use UTC instead of profile diary timezones.
deviations: The exact GoalBuddy Judge exceeded the single-wait limit, so the PM performed the same read-only gate as permitted fallback.
remaining_blockers: Use nutrient-specific completeness and profile-local date buckets consistently.
